callGraph.callee: new List<(SectionDefinition Def, int Priority, string Root)>

Directory.GetFiles(root, "manifest.json", SearchOption.AllDirectories)
                .Select(Path.GetDirectoryName)
                .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
                .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .Select(x => ReadDefinition(x!))
                .Where(x => x is not null)
                .Cast<SectionDefinition>

collected
            .GroupBy(x => x.Def.ComponentName, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(g => g
                .OrderBy(x => x.Priority)
                .ThenByDescending(x => IsNestedStorePath(x.Root, x.Def.StoreDirectory))
                .First().Def)
            .OrderBy(x => x.Kind, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .ThenBy(x => x.Variant, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .ThenBy(x => x.DisplayName, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .ToList

            .ThenBy
